# Feature: In-app Review UI

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 -->

## Intent
Developers review uncertain facts in-app during development, not only via CLI — accept, edit, or reject pending review items with German UI copy.

## Preconditions
- `AutoGuideProvider` runs with `mode="development"`
- Host passes `reviews: ReviewItem[]` and `facts: Fact[]` (or uses in-memory provider state)
- Core `ReviewQueue.applyReviewWithVerification` handles business logic

## Happy Path
- [ ] Dev mode shows review FAB with pending queue count badge when items exist
- [ ] Review panel lists pending items with key, value, confidence, and reason
- [ ] Accept updates fact `reviewStatus` to `approved` via `ReviewQueue`
- [ ] Reject removes item from queue and sets `reviewStatus` to `rejected`
- [ ] Edited value on accept flows through `applyReviewWithVerification`
- [ ] `onReviewDecision` callback receives updated fact, queue, and history
- [ ] Without callback, provider updates facts/reviews in memory (demo mode)

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Published mode hides entire review UI (`ReviewPanel` returns null)
- [ ] Empty review queue hides FAB badge trigger
- [ ] ESC closes review panel; focus trap within panel
- [ ] Missing fact for review item is skipped safely

## Regression
- [ ] Existing `widget.test.tsx` tests pass
- [ ] Help widget and Inspector unchanged in published mode

## Assumptions
- Browser persistence requires host `onReviewDecision` (e.g. dev API); in-memory demo sufficient for acceptance
- Review UI scoped to `@autoguide/react` first; other adapters deferred

## Implementation Notes
- `plugins/react/src/ReviewPanel.tsx` — dev-only FAB + panel with queue badge, German copy, ESC/focus trap
- `plugins/react/src/apply-review.ts` — headless `applyReviewDecision` via core `ReviewQueue`
- `plugins/react/src/review-types.ts` — `ReviewDecisionPayload` (breaks import cycle)
- `plugins/react/src/AutoGuideProvider.tsx` — `reviews`, `reviewHistory`, `applyReview`, in-memory demo state
- `plugins/react/src/context.tsx` — extended context with review fields
- Tests: `review-ui.test.ts` (accept/reject), `widget.test.tsx` (direct imports, no barrel hang)
